description:
Product information:
1. Built-in microphone, can transmit sound within 10 meters.
2. The head can be freely rotated up and down 45 degrees, and the angle can be easily adjusted by 180 degrees.
3. Imported optical lens, high precision, no distorted pictures.
4. 2K ultra clear
5. Focal length: 8 cm infinity
6: Signal-to-noise ratio: more than 48 decibels (30 F / s 220 lux)
specification:
Colour: Black ,
HD camera, chip + lens in the default window
Built-in digital microphone, can absorb sound source within 10 meters.
Suitable for desktop and laptop
Support Windows 2000/XP/window7/win8/window10/Vista 32-bit etc.
Support CC2000, web conferencing, ICQ, MSN, Yahoo Messenger and Skype, etc.


Packing list::
Camera X1
